calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioners Yuan Cong Situ and mother Feng Jiao Ma. Mother Feng Jiao Ma present in court. Concent form from father on file. Cantonese Interpreter Ruan Sihong sworn.
Petitioner Sworn and examined on her own behalf and as petitioner for minor.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Chanege of Name of minor from Jessica Silicia Situ to Jessica Babe Leung. Court also grants petition of Feng Jiao Ma to change her name to Ulrica Ag Mica.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
